title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 20 December 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 20 December 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 20 December 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 21/12/2024
This week, the ship recycling markets across the four major destinations continued to face challenges, with little improvement in activity or pricing. Source: Best Oasis Limited
tweet

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
17 December - 20 December 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week, the ship recycling markets across the four major destinations continued to face challenges, with little improvement in activity or pricing. In India,
the market saw several vessels being offered, including large units like VLCCs, but the availability did not translate into heightened activity.
